title: Babool-Dyed Straight Kurti
subtitle: Earthy Terracotta Tone, Kala Cotton
description: A straight-cut kurti in Kala cotton, dyed a warm terracotta using Babool bark mordant. Minimal detailing lets the texture of the handloom cloth carry the piece.
craftStory: Babool and Khejri bark dyeing is a slow, small-batch process — each lot of cloth picks up slightly different depth of tone depending on the bark, the water, and the season. We don't try to standardise this; it's part of what makes the piece naturally made rather than manufactured.
careInstructions: Cold hand-wash separately, shade dry, light steam iron if needed.
details: Side slits for ease of movement
